output:
All four checks pass:
- ruff check: passed
- ruff format --check: passed (after one reformat)
- pytest: 336 passed
- mypy: clean

Task 2.6.1 done. Added `_check_structural_sanity(lines, source_path)` to `bob_tools/planfile/parser.py` — a pre-parse scan that raises `PlanSyntaxError` listing every anomaly (duplicate H1 titles, multiple Bugs sections at any heading level, duplicate phase/stage ordinals) with 1-based line locators. It is invoked from `parse_plan` immediately after `splitlines()`, before any structural parsing, so the typed `Plan` never has to represent a corrupted document. Order of recognition matches mcloop (stage → bugs → H1) so `# Phase 1: ...` is not double-counted. Added 10 tests in a new `TestCheckStructuralSanity` class covering each anomaly individually, the H1/stage disambiguation, multi-error aggregation, source-path passthrough, and clean-plan no-op.
